## tscli set user invite

Set user invite status

### Synopsis

Resend a user invite

```
tscli set user invite [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help        help for invite
      --id string   User invite ID
      --resend      Resend the invite
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```

  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
